panels.title: Healthy
panels.description: jitsi_jvb_healthy: whether the bridge instance is healthy.

panels.title: Participants
panels.description: jitsi_jvb_local_endpoints: local endpoints currently on the bridge(s).

panels.title: Largest conference
panels.description: jitsi_jvb_largest_conference: endpoints in the largest conference.

panels.title: Bridges up
panels.description: Number of JVB instances currently scraped.

panels.title: Avg RTT
panels.description: jitsi_jvb_average_rtt: avg RTT across local endpoints (ms).

panels.title: Conferences
panels.description: Current conferences broken down by state.

panels.title: Conferences by size (endpoints)
panels.description: jitsi_jvb_conferences_by_size histogram. Distribution of conference sizes over time. NOT available via the JSON /colibri/stats endpoint.

panels.title: Conference size quantiles (endpoints)
panels.description: Quantiles derived from the conferences_by_size histogram.

panels.title: Packets/s & data-channel msgs/s
panels.description: Counter rates for packets and data-channel messages.

panels.title: Queue & RTP pipeline errors (per min)
panels.description: Packet-pipeline drops and exceptions. Sustained non-zero values indicate an overloaded bridge.

panels.title: Colibri WebSocket errors & closes (per min)
panels.description: Colibri WS error and close events.
